stamp.title: Upload Stamp
stamp.tooltip: "Ausdruck auf DIN A4 Normalpapier (Einlegeblatt)" must have been selected during purchase.

success.title: Stamp uploaded successfully!
success.description: Your Deutsche Post stamp has been verified and will be used for the letter.

error.title: Stamp validation failed
error.invalid_file: Please upload a valid PDF file.
error.invalid_author: This doesn't appear to be a valid Deutsche Post INTERNETMARKE stamp.
error.invalid_format: Please use the "Einlegeblatt" (insert sheet) format, not the "Ausdruck" (cutout) version.

error.title: Submission Failed
error.NETWORK_ERROR: Could not connect to the server. Please check your internet connection and try again.
error.RATELIMIT: Too many requests. Please wait a moment before trying again.
error.VALIDATION_ERROR: Please check your input and try again.
error.SERVER_ERROR: An error occurred on the server. Please try again later.
error.BUSY: The server is currently busy. Please wait a moment and try again.
error.TIMEOUT: The request timed out. Please try again.
error.UNKNOWN: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
